Assessing Molecular Docking Tools to Guide Targeted Drug Discovery of CD38 Inhibitors

Authors: Eric Boittier, Yat Yin Tang, McKenna E Buckley, Zachariah P Schuurs, Derek J Richard, Neha S Gandhi

Journal: International Journal of Molecular Sciences (2020)

DOI: 10.3390/ijms21155183
